# Memory

## Project: paper-1-emergence

**Status:** GPT-2 replication complete. Targeting TechRxiv then arXiv.

**Compound binding (2.8B) — confirmed from CSVs:**
- screen reader: 101 total >0.1, 25 strong (0.5+), top 0.9909
- alt text: 211 total >0.1, 49 strong (0.5+), top 0.9856
- skip link: 158 total >0.1, 32 strong (0.5+), top 0.9816

**Figure pipeline:** Three figures generated by `paper-1/generate-figures.py`. Run from `paper-1/` directory. Figures output to `paper/figures/`.

**Figures (current):**
- fig-pythia-perplexity.png — preference ratio line chart (Pythia, screen reader)
- fig-gpt2-perplexity.png  — preference ratio line chart (GPT-2, screen reader)
- fig-binding-persistence.png — last strong binding layer bar chart (Pythia)

**Preference ratio format:** wrong_ppl / correct_ppl. >1.0 = correct preferred (flip happened). Pythia values derived from raw perplexity; GPT-2 values from paper-reported multiples (raw not retained).

**Style:**
- Font: Atkinson Hyperlegible (installed via brew)
- Chart colors: navy/blue palette (#08306b, #2171b5, #6baed6)
- Heatmap: green #5ba300 (correct, black text), blue #054fb9 (partial, white text), white (incorrect, black text)
- All WCAG AA compliant

**L1H12 finding:** Top binding head for screen reader (0.9909) and skip link (0.9913), third for alt text (0.9844, behind L1H25 and L3H1). Consistent presence across all three compounds is the key claim — not raw score alone.

**GPT-2 replication added (major):**
- All four experiments replicated on GPT-2 small/medium/large/XL (117M–1.5B)
- Screen reader perplexity flip at 406M→838M (matches Pythia's 410M→1B)
- Binding jump at medium→large (12→34 strong heads) coincides with flip
- GPT-2 XL last strong layer ~35% depth vs Pythia 2.8B ~91% — WebText vs The Pile
- Skip link never flips in either model family
- Results restructured: results/pythia/ and results/gpt2/ subdirectories
- Radford et al. (2019) added to references

**Build pipeline (paper-1/build-paper.sh):**
- pandoc + lualatex, template at paper/template.tex
- PDF/UA-2 + PDF/A-4f tagging via \DocumentMetadata (lualatex required, TeX Live 2022+)
- documentclass=extarticle, fontsize=14pt, Atkinson Hyperlegible, 1.5 linestretch
- Abstract lives in paper/metadata.yaml (not 01-abstract.md which is a reference copy)
- Colophon: paper/sections/10-colophon.md — stub created, user will write it
- Template fix: custom \maketitle uses \section*{\@title} for H1 tag in accessibility tree
- Template fix: \providecommand{\pandocbounded}[1]{#1} added for pandoc 3.x compat
- Figure paths in markdown must be relative to paper-1/ (build dir), not to sections/

**Remaining prose work:**
- Write 10-colophon.md
- Items 3, 4, 5 from original list (inverse scaling ARIA framing, prompt template disclosure, voice pass) — prose work for Claude.ai
- Table symbols: LaTeX ($\checkmark$/$\times$) confirmed working in current build

## Workflow preferences

**Division of labor:** claude.ai for research thinking and prose; Claude Code (me) for anything touching the repo, running scripts, file operations.

**Commit style:** Commit at natural checkpoints, not after every change. User is relaxed about commit frequency but likes having fallback points at significant milestones.

**Communication style:** Conversational is fine. User appreciates directness and honesty over flattery.
